# Treasury — Regulatory Constraints

| Regulation                    | Requirement                                        |
|-------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------|
| CRR Art. 412-428              | LCR calculation, composition, and daily reporting  |
| CRR Art. 428a-428au           | NSFR calculation, reporting, and factor weights    |
| Basel III LCR (BCBS Jan 2013) | 100% minimum LCR maintained daily from 1 Jan 2019  |
| ECB ILAAP Guide 2018          | Internal Liquidity Adequacy Assessment Process     |
| PRA SS24/15                   | UK: ILAAP and liquidity risk management            |
| EMIR Art. 11                  | Derivatives margining: VM + IM on cleared/uncleared|
| MiFID II Art. 49              | Best execution obligations on all FX transactions  |
| MAR (EU 596/2014)             | Market abuse prevention in treasury operations     |
| Dodd-Frank (US)               | Swap dealer registration and margin requirements   |
| FRTB (CRR II Art. 325)        | Revised Trading Book capital requirements          |
